data.title: Bitcoin At $93,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Gain On Positive CPI Report
data.description:

data.title: XRP Is Back in the Conversation for 2026 — Here Is What Analysts Are Actually Watching
data.description:
XRP has re-emerged as a significant topic of discussion in the cryptocurrency community for the year 2026, and in this article, we will explore the various factors and trends that analysts are closely monitoring to gauge its potential performance and impact on the market. With a renewed interest in this digital asset, experts are examining key indicators, market dynamics, regulatory developments, and technological advancements that could influence XRP's trajectory in the coming years. Here is a comprehensive overview of what analysts are actually focusing on as they assess XRP's viability and prospects in the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-is-back-in-the-conversation-for-2026-here-is-what-analysts-are-actually-watching/

data.title: French regulator reports some crypto firms unresponsive as EU MiCA licence deadline nears
data.description:
A French regulator has revealed that 30% of crypto companies without a MiCA licence in France are unresponsive. There’s no communication on ​whether they intend to get the licence required under new EU ‌ rules or will cease operating by July. Stéphane Pontoizeau, executive director of the market intermediaries and market infrastructures supervision directorate at […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/french-regulator-reports-some-crypto-firms-unresponsive-as-eu-mica-licence-deadline-nears/

data.title: ClearBank Partners With Taurus to Expand Stablecoin Services
data.description:
ClearBank has announced a partnership with Swiss digital asset infrastructure provider Taurus as part of its push into stablecoin-based financial services. The collaboration positions ClearBank to bridge traditional banking infrastructure with blockchain-powered payments, focusing initially on regulated stablecoin use cases.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/clearbank-partners-with-taurus-to-expand-stablecoin-services/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 94,000 USDT with a 2.45% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 13, 2026, 19:34 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 94,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 94,068 USDT, with a narrowed 2.45% increase in 24 hours.
